attributes.description: Alerts when `etcd_server_slow_apply_total` increases. Raft applies exceeding the expected duration indicate disk or compaction contention.
attributes.name: [etcd OTel] Slow apply operations

investigation_guide.blob:
## etcd slow apply operations

### What fired
Counter `etcd_server_slow_apply_total` incremented during the window.

### Why it matters
etcd considers an apply 'slow' when it takes > 100 ms. Sustained slow applies indicate slow disk or compaction thrashing that will cascade into leader churn and client timeouts.

### Triage
1. Check disk fsync latency and IOPS.
2. Inspect compaction backlog and DB size trend.
3. Look for CPU contention.

### Remediation
- Upgrade storage.
- Run defrag to reduce DB size.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-default*
// Counter: Raft applies that exceeded expected duration (~100ms); indicates slow disk or compaction contention
| WHERE etcd_server_slow_apply_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS increase = SUM(INCREASE(etcd_server_slow_apply_total))
    BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| WHERE increase > 0
| SORT increase DESC
